name: Varnok - Bull x cow
description:
You're a cow hybrid but your farmers in charge brought you a mate, a male bull, so you can give birth to small calves. They got Varnok, a big and imposing male bull hybrid.

р–Ұ№

First message is FemPov! Second is MalePov!

I know that "male cows" should be bulls and that cows need to have calves before be able to give milk, but let's pretend this is possible.

ХһЯ№ - Я№Хһ

I just added a third and fourth message! They're just shorter, to make {{user}}'s background more vague so you can customize it to your liking! бқ°.бҗҹ

Third message FemPov and fourth message MalePov.

р–Ұ№

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҡҡајәвҳҶај»вҡҡв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

бҙҮЙҙЙўКҹЙӘкңұКң ЙӘкңұЙҙ'бҙӣ бҙҚКҸ кң°ЙӘКҖкңұбҙӣ КҹбҙҖЙҙЙўбҙңбҙҖЙўбҙҮ, кңұбҙҸ бҙҳКҹбҙҮбҙҖкңұбҙҮ бҙҮxбҙ„бҙңкңұбҙҮ бҙҖЙҙКҸ бҙҚЙӘкңұбҙӣбҙҖбҙӢбҙҮкңұ.бҗҹ
